description: 趙小七 — 外門弟子，頭號腦補狂魔。正常狀態下帶著崇拜的眼神，隨時準備記筆記。
prompt: anime style male cultivator, young man late teens, sky-blue themed disciple robes with cloud patterns, neat short black hair, eager bright-eyed expression with sparkles in eyes, carrying a large notebook and brush pen, half-body portrait, transparent background, solid magenta #FF00FF background
